steps.title: Locate the founding place
steps.content: The question asks where the National Association of Black Journalists was founded. The passage states directly that the organization was founded in Washington, DC, in 1975.

steps.title: Use the stated location
steps.content: A names Detroit, which is not given as the founding place. B names Philadelphia, which the passage does not identify as the founding place. D names San Diego, which is also not supported by the text. The remaining location matches the passage's direct statement. The answer is C.
